items.title: 'Everything has to come to an end': Samit Patel bows out of English cricket after 24 years
items.summary: Spinning allrounder reflects on formidable career, as he targets future role as coach ... and maybe selector
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Could Spurs fans take solace from a season in the Championship?
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur fans will not want to contemplate relegation - but if the worst should happen, they may take solace from a season in the Championship.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Bhai ye kya tamasha hai?': PSL faces troll storm after 'Mascot fight'
items.summary: A pre-match mascot scuffle at the Pakistan Super League's Karachi Kings vs. Lahore Qalandars clash sparked amusement and debate. Captains Warner and Afridi were seen laughing as...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
